title: New Immigration Restrictions On H-1B Visas And Students Are Coming - Green & Spiegel
content:
## New Immigration Restrictions On H-1B Visas And Students Are Coming
Jonathan Grode was featured in Forbes discussing the growing challenges employers and skilled professionals face under evolving U.S. immigration policies. In the article, Grode addressed the impact of rising H-1B costs, restrictive regulations, and increased enforcement measures on businesses seeking international talent, warning that smaller employers may soon be priced out of the visa category entirely.
